questionText: Você está no aeroporto e precisa perguntar em qual portão de embarque o seu voo vai sair. O que você diz ao funcionário?
correctAnswer: Could you tell me which gate my flight departs from?
options: Could you tell me which gate my flight departs from?
Where is the plane going to land?
Can I check in my baggage here?
What time does the airport close?

questionText: Você chega ao hotel e quer confirmar que sua reserva foi feita. O que você diz à recepcionista?
correctAnswer: I have a reservation under the name Santos.
options: I have a reservation under the name Santos.
I would like to make a reservation for tonight.
Is there a room available for next week?
Can you recommend a good hotel nearby?

questionText: Você precisa pedir informações sobre o horário de partida do trem na estação. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: What time does the train to London depart?
options: What time does the train to London depart?
How much does a taxi to London cost?
Where can I buy a bus ticket?
Is there a ferry to London?

questionText: Você está num restaurante em outro país e quer pedir a conta. O que você diz ao garçom?
correctAnswer: Could we have the bill, please?
options: Could we have the bill, please?
Can I have the menu again?
Is service included in the price?
What do you recommend for dessert?

questionText: No aeroporto, você quer saber onde fica o balcão de despacho de bagagem. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, where is the check-in counter for this airline?
options: Excuse me, where is the check-in counter for this airline?
Can I take this bag on board with me?
How many bags can I check in for free?
Is my flight on time?

questionText: Você quer pedir ao recepcionista do hotel para chamar um táxi para o aeroporto. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you call a taxi for me to the airport, please?
options: Could you call a taxi for me to the airport, please?
What is the best way to get to the city centre?
How far is the airport from here?
Is there a shuttle bus to the train station?

questionText: Você está num posto de turismo e quer receber um mapa da cidade. O que você pede?
correctAnswer: Could I have a map of the city, please?
options: Could I have a map of the city, please?
Where is the nearest bus stop?
Can you book a tour for me?
What are the opening hours of the museum?

questionText: Você perdeu o seu passaporte durante a viagem e precisa reportar o ocorrido à polícia. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'd like to report a lost passport.
options: I'd like to report a lost passport.
I need to renew my passport urgently.
Can you help me find my luggage?
I want to apply for a new visa.

questionText: Você está no hotel e quer saber se o café da manhã está incluído na diária. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
options: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
What time is dinner served?
Do you have a restaurant on site?
Can I have breakfast in my room?

questionText: Você quer comprar uma passagem de ônibus de ida e volta. O que você diz na bilheteria?
correctAnswer: A return ticket to Oxford, please.
options: A return ticket to Oxford, please.
A single ticket to Oxford, please.
I'd like to cancel my ticket to Oxford.
Is there a direct bus to Oxford?

questionText: Você está num aeroporto estrangeiro e precisa passar pela alfândega. O funcionário pergunta o motivo da sua visita. O que você responde?
correctAnswer: I'm here for tourism — I plan to sightsee for two weeks.
options: I'm here for tourism — I plan to sightsee for two weeks.
I'm just passing through on my way to another country.
I live here permanently and I'm returning home.
I'm here to attend a business conference indefinitely.

questionText: Você está no avião e quer pedir ao comissário de bordo uma almofada para dormir. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could I have a pillow, please?
options: Could I have a pillow, please?
Can you lower the window shade for me?
Is there a blanket available in the overhead bin?
What snacks do you have on this flight?

questionText: Você quer trocar dinheiro no aeroporto e pergunta qual é a taxa de câmbio atual. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: What's the current exchange rate for Brazilian reals?
options: What's the current exchange rate for Brazilian reals?
Can I pay by credit card instead of cash?
Where is the nearest ATM machine?
How much does it cost to withdraw money here?

questionText: No hotel, você precisa pedir ao serviço de quarto que tragam toalhas limpas. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you send some fresh towels to room 214, please?
options: Could you send some fresh towels to room 214, please?
Can I get a late checkout tomorrow?
Is laundry service available at this hotel?
I need extra hangers for my clothes.

questionText: Você está num museu e quer saber se há desconto para estudantes. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Is there a student discount for the entrance fee?
options: Is there a student discount for the entrance fee?
Can I take photos inside the museum?
What are the guided tour times?
Is the museum open on public holidays?

questionText: Você alugou um carro e quer confirmar se o seguro está incluído no preço. O que você pergunta na locadora?
correctAnswer: Is insurance included in the rental price?
options: Is insurance included in the rental price?
What kind of car would you like to rent?
Can I return the car at a different location?
What is the speed limit on the motorway?

questionText: Você está no aeroporto e seu voo foi cancelado. Você quer saber se será realocado em outro voo. O que você diz ao funcionário da companhia aérea?
correctAnswer: My flight has been cancelled. Could you rebook me on the next available flight?
options: My flight has been cancelled. Could you rebook me on the next available flight?
I missed my flight. Can I get a refund?
My seat has been changed without notice. I want an upgrade.
The flight is delayed. How long do we have to wait?

questionText: Você está num hotel e quer fazer uma reclamação porque o ar-condicionado do seu quarto não está funcionando. Como você expressa isso de forma educada na recepção?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid there seems to be a problem with the air conditioning in my room.
options: I'm afraid there seems to be a problem with the air conditioning in my room.
The air conditioning is broken and I want a refund immediately.
Can you explain why my room has no heating?
I would like to request a room with a better view.

questionText: Você está num voo de longa duração e quer pedir ao comissário para mudar de assento porque o vizinho está incomodando. Como você se expressa de forma diplomática?
correctAnswer: I was wondering if it might be possible to move to a different seat.
options: I was wondering if it might be possible to move to a different seat.
I demand that you remove this passenger from the plane.
Tell this person next to me to stop talking.
I need a seat at the front of the cabin right now.

questionText: Você está negociando com um guia turístico particular e quer saber se ele pode oferecer um preço mais acessível para o tour. Como você pergunta sutilmente?
correctAnswer: Is there any flexibility on the price for the private tour?
options: Is there any flexibility on the price for the private tour?
This tour is too expensive. I won't pay that much.
Why does this tour cost more than the others?
Can I get this tour for free if I bring more people?

questionText: Você alugou um apartamento pelo Airbnb e, ao chegar, percebe que as condições não correspondem ao que foi anunciado. Como você aborda o anfitrião de forma assertiva mas educada?
correctAnswer: The property doesn't quite match what was described in the listing. Could we discuss this?
options: The property doesn't quite match what was described in the listing. Could we discuss this?
I want a full refund because this place is terrible.
Your apartment is nothing like the photos. I'm leaving.
I think you should update your listing to show the real condition.

questionText: Você está num restaurant e quer reclamar gentilmente que o prato que você pediu chegou frio. O que você diz ao garçom?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, I think there might be an issue — my meal arrived cold.
options: Excuse me, I think there might be an issue — my meal arrived cold.
This food is disgusting and I won't pay for it.
Can I speak to the chef about this terrible dish?
I ordered something different from what I received.

questionText: Você está na fila de imigração e o oficial pergunta por quanto tempo você pretende ficar no país. Qual resposta é mais adequada e natural?
correctAnswer: I'll be staying for approximately ten days, just as a tourist.
options: I'll be staying for approximately ten days, just as a tourist.
I don't know yet. It depends on how I feel.
Maybe a long time. I might decide to live here.
As long as my visa allows, which is none of your business.

questionText: Você está num tour guiado e quer pedir ao guia que repita uma informação porque não entendeu. Como você faz isso de forma educada?
correctAnswer: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you go over that point again?
options: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you go over that point again?
Can you speak slower? I don't understand your accent.
What did you say? I wasn't listening.
Please repeat everything from the beginning.

questionText: Você está hospedado num hotel e quer solicitar um check-out tardio. Como você faz esse pedido de forma apropriada?
correctAnswer: Would it be possible to arrange a late checkout? I have a late afternoon flight.
options: Would it be possible to arrange a late checkout? I have a late afternoon flight.
I need to stay in my room until the evening without paying more.
I'm not leaving at noon. That's too early for me.
Can you hold my baggage? I'll check out whenever I feel like it.

questionText: Você quer expressar sua satisfação com uma excursão turística ao guia ao final do passeio. Qual expressão é mais natural e apropriada em inglês?
correctAnswer: The tour was absolutely brilliant — we really appreciated all the historical insights you shared.
options: The tour was absolutely brilliant — we really appreciated all the historical insights you shared.
It was okay. I've seen better tours in other countries.
The tour was good. Thank you for talking.
We liked the tour. You did your job well.

questionText: Você está alugando um carro e o atendente pergunta se você deseja proteção adicional contra danos. Como você recusa educadamente mas com segurança?
correctAnswer: Thanks, but I'll pass on the extra coverage — my credit card already provides collision protection.
options: Thanks, but I'll pass on the extra coverage — my credit card already provides collision protection.
No, I don't need insurance. Nothing will happen to the car.
I don't want to pay for anything extra at all.
Just give me the cheapest option and don't ask me more questions.

questionText: Você está num voo com escala e precisa confirmar com a comissária se sua bagagem será transferida automaticamente para o próximo voo. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: Could you confirm whether my checked luggage will be automatically transferred to my connecting flight?
options: Could you confirm whether my checked luggage will be automatically transferred to my connecting flight?
Do I need to collect my bags at the next stop?
Will my suitcase arrive on time?
Is there someone who can carry my bags for me?

questionText: Você está numa conferência internacional e quer recomendar um hotel a um colega que vai visitar a mesma cidade. Como você formula a recomendação de forma natural?
correctAnswer: If you're looking for something central with good amenities, I'd highly recommend the Grand Plaza — the location is unbeatable.
options: If you're looking for something central with good amenities, I'd highly recommend the Grand Plaza — the location is unbeatable.
The Grand Plaza is a hotel. You should go there.
I stayed at Grand Plaza. It was fine.
Grand Plaza has good reviews online.

questionText: Você está discutindo com um amigo sobre qual é a melhor forma de viajar pela Europa — de trem ou de avião — e quer expressar sua preferência explicando o motivo. Qual resposta demonstra domínio B2?
correctAnswer: Personally, I'd rather travel by rail — not only is it more scenic, but it's also considerably more eco-friendly than flying.
options: Personally, I'd rather travel by rail — not only is it more scenic, but it's also considerably more eco-friendly than flying.
I like trains more than planes because trains are nice.
Planes are fast but I prefer slow travel sometimes.
Both are good options depending on the destination.

questionText: Você está num hotel de alto padrão e quer reclamar com elegância que o quarto que lhe foi atribuído não corresponde à categoria superior pela qual você pagou. Como você formula essa reclamação?
correctAnswer: I believe there may have been a mix-up — I specifically booked a superior room, yet I seem to have been assigned a standard one.
options: I believe there may have been a mix-up — I specifically booked a superior room, yet I seem to have been assigned a standard one.
My room is wrong. I want a better room now.
You gave me the wrong room. This is not what I paid for.
I am very unhappy with my room and demand to see the manager.

questionText: Você perdeu um voo de conexão porque o voo anterior atrasou. Você precisa solicitar à companhia aérea compensação por gastos adicionais de hospedagem. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Given that the missed connection was due to your airline's delay, I'd like to inquire about reimbursement for my overnight accommodation expenses.
options: Given that the missed connection was due to your airline's delay, I'd like to inquire about reimbursement for my overnight accommodation expenses.
Your delay ruined my trip. Pay for my hotel.
I want money for the hotel I had to stay in because you were late.
The airline must compensate me for everything I spent.

questionText: Você está tentando convencer um funcionário da imigração de que sua visita é legítima, após ele questionar o propósito da sua viagem. Qual resposta demonstra fluência e credibilidade em nível B2?
correctAnswer: I understand your concern. I have a return ticket booked for the 15th, a hotel reservation, and sufficient funds for my stay — I can provide all the documentation if needed.
options: I understand your concern. I have a return ticket booked for the 15th, a hotel reservation, and sufficient funds for my stay — I can provide all the documentation if needed.
I am just a tourist. Please let me in.
I have everything. Don't worry. I will go back to Brazil.
My visa is valid. That should be enough.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma avaliação crítica mas equilibrada sobre um hotel em inglês, para uma plataforma de viagens. Qual é a forma mais sofisticada de expressar que o serviço foi inconsistente?
correctAnswer: While the facilities were undeniably impressive, the quality of service varied considerably depending on the time of day and which staff member was on duty.
options: While the facilities were undeniably impressive, the quality of service varied considerably depending on the time of day and which staff member was on duty.
The hotel was nice but the service was sometimes bad.
Some staff were good and some were not very helpful.
The hotel has good infrastructure but bad workers.

questionText: Você está tentando obter uma atualização de assento num voo internacional sem pagar pelo upgrade. Qual é a abordagem mais sofisticada e eficaz ao falar com o funcionário no balcão?
correctAnswer: I noticed there may be availability in business class. I've been a frequent flyer with your airline for years — is there any possibility of a complimentary upgrade?
options: I noticed there may be availability in business class. I've been a frequent flyer with your airline for years — is there any possibility of a complimentary upgrade?
Can you give me a free upgrade? The economy seats are uncomfortable.
I want to sit in business class. Is it possible for free?
Upgrade me please. I have been flying with you for a long time.

questionText: Você está negociando com um guia local privado a possibilidade de personalizar completamente o roteiro de um tour, incluindo paradas fora do roteiro padrão. Como você formula esse pedido de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: We'd be interested in a tailored itinerary rather than the standard route — could we discuss incorporating some off-the-beaten-track stops?
options: We'd be interested in a tailored itinerary rather than the standard route — could we discuss incorporating some off-the-beaten-track stops?
We don't want the normal tour. We want to go to different places.
Can you show us things that aren't in your normal tour?
We want a different program. Can you change it?

questionText: Você está descrevendo para um amigo brasileiro, em inglês, as diferenças culturais que percebeu ao viajar pelo Japão. Qual resposta demonstra profundidade analítica de nível B2?
correctAnswer: What struck me most was the pervasive sense of social harmony — people go to extraordinary lengths to avoid inconveniencing others, which shapes everything from queue etiquette to noise levels on public transport.
options: What struck me most was the pervasive sense of social harmony — people go to extraordinary lengths to avoid inconveniencing others, which shapes everything from queue etiquette to noise levels on public transport.
Japan is very different. People are very polite and quiet.
Japanese people don't like to make noise in public places.
It was interesting to see how polite everyone was in Japan.

questionText: Você está negociando com a companhia de seguros de viagem por telefone, tentando obter cobertura para uma consulta médica que fez durante a viagem. Qual expressão melhor demonstra domínio B2?
correctAnswer: According to the terms of my policy, emergency medical consultations abroad should be fully covered. I'd appreciate it if you could clarify why this particular claim is being disputed.
options: According to the terms of my policy, emergency medical consultations abroad should be fully covered. I'd appreciate it if you could clarify why this particular claim is being disputed.
My insurance should pay for the doctor. Why don't you pay?
I want my money back for the medical appointment I had.
The insurance company must pay for everything when I travel.

questionText: Você está escrevendo para o hotel por e-mail para fazer uma solicitação especial antes de chegar, pois é uma viagem de lua de mel. Qual mensagem é mais elegante e eficaz?
correctAnswer: As this is our honeymoon, we would be truly grateful if the hotel could arrange any small welcome gesture — flowers or a bottle of sparkling wine would be a wonderful touch.
options: As this is our honeymoon, we would be truly grateful if the hotel could arrange any small welcome gesture — flowers or a bottle of sparkling wine would be a wonderful touch.
We are coming for our honeymoon. Please put something special in our room.
We just got married. Can you decorate our room?
Give us flowers and wine because it is our honeymoon.

questionText: Você está num evento de networking internacional durante uma viagem de negócios e quer iniciar uma conversa com alguém de outro país, mencionando que acabou de chegar. Qual abertura é mais natural e sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I've just flown in from São Paulo — this is my first time at this particular conference. Are you based here locally or have you also travelled far?
options: I've just flown in from São Paulo — this is my first time at this particular conference. Are you based here locally or have you also travelled far?
Hello. I am from Brazil. Where are you from?
I just arrived. This is a good conference, right?
I travelled from Brazil. It was a long flight.

questionText: Você está numa discussão sobre turismo sustentável e quer expressar sua opinião de que os destinos turísticos populares sofrem com o excesso de visitantes. Qual expressão demonstra melhor o nível B2?
correctAnswer: The issue of overtourism is becoming increasingly pressing — iconic destinations are struggling to preserve their cultural heritage while managing the environmental strain brought by mass tourism.
options: The issue of overtourism is becoming increasingly pressing — iconic destinations are struggling to preserve their cultural heritage while managing the environmental strain brought by mass tourism.
Too many tourists are bad for famous places.
Famous tourist spots have too many visitors and this is a problem.
Overtourism is a problem because there are too many people in some places.

questionText: Você está num hotel fazendo o check-in e o recepcionista informa que seu quarto ainda não está pronto. Você quer perguntar se pode deixar sua bagagem guardada enquanto espera. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: That's no problem. Would it be possible to leave my luggage here in the meantime?
options: That's no problem. Would it be possible to leave my luggage here in the meantime?
Where should I put my bags while I wait?
Can someone carry my luggage to my room later?
I need to store my bags. Is there a fee for that?

questionText: Você está num táxi e o motorista tomou um caminho muito longo. Você quer questionar o trajeto de forma polida mas firme. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, I'm not entirely sure this is the most direct route — could you explain why we're going this way?
options: Excuse me, I'm not entirely sure this is the most direct route — could you explain why we're going this way?
You are going the wrong way. Stop and let me out.
I know a shorter route. Follow my instructions.
Why is this taxi ride taking so long? Are you lost?

questionText: Você está planejando uma viagem e pergunta a um amigo que já esteve no destino sobre o melhor período para visitar. Qual pergunta é mais rica e demonstra nível B2?
correctAnswer: Bearing in mind that I'd like to avoid the peak season crowds, when would you say is the ideal time to visit?
options: Bearing in mind that I'd like to avoid the peak season crowds, when would you say is the ideal time to visit?
When is the best time to go there?
What month should I visit to avoid tourists?
Is it better to go there in summer or winter?

questionText: Você precisa informar ao guia turístico que um membro do seu grupo tem uma deficiência física e precisará de acessibilidade durante o passeio. Como você comunica isso de forma adequada?
correctAnswer: I should mention that one of our group has limited mobility — could you ensure that the itinerary includes accessible routes throughout?
options: I should mention that one of our group has limited mobility — could you ensure that the itinerary includes accessible routes throughout?
One person in our group can't walk well. Can you help?
We have someone disabled. Please take care of them.
My friend uses a wheelchair. Is the tour okay for him?

questionText: Você está chegando num país com regulamentações estritas sobre itens trazidos na bagagem. O oficial de alfândega pergunta se você tem algo para declarar. Como você responde de forma correta e natural?
correctAnswer: I have some personal items and a few gifts for friends, all within the duty-free allowance.
options: I have some personal items and a few gifts for friends, all within the duty-free allowance.
I have nothing to declare. Everything is personal.
No, I only have my clothes and a few small things.
I brought some things from Brazil but nothing expensive.

questionText: Você está num cruzeiro e quer saber quais atividades opcionais estão disponíveis durante a parada no porto. Como você pergunta ao coordenador de atividades?
correctAnswer: What shore excursions are available during our port stop tomorrow?
options: What shore excursions are available during our port stop tomorrow?
What time do we arrive at the next island?
Is it possible to get off the ship at night?
Can we stay on the ship while others go ashore?

questionText: Você está tentando negociar uma tarifa mais baixa num hotel porque encontrou um preço melhor online. Como você aborda isso com o recepcionista?
correctAnswer: I noticed the rate on your website is lower than what I was quoted. Would you be able to match that price?
options: I noticed the rate on your website is lower than what I was quoted. Would you be able to match that price?
The price you gave me is wrong. Change it.
I want the cheapest room you have, no matter what.
Why is your hotel so expensive compared to others?

questionText: Você viajou e sua mala foi extraviada pela companhia aérea. Você está no balcão de atendimento e quer descrever a situação de forma clara e assertiva. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: My luggage didn't arrive on the carousel. I need to file a lost baggage report.
options: My luggage didn't arrive on the carousel. I need to file a lost baggage report.
Someone took my suitcase by mistake from the belt.
I think the airline lost my passport as well.
My bag is damaged. I want to be compensated.

questionText: Você está numa agência de viagens e quer cancelar um pacote de viagem devido a circunstâncias imprevistas. Como você explica a situação ao atendente de forma formal?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid I need to cancel my booking due to unforeseen circumstances. Could you walk me through the cancellation policy?
options: I'm afraid I need to cancel my booking due to unforeseen circumstances. Could you walk me through the cancellation policy?
I changed my mind about the trip. Give me my money back.
Cancel my trip. I don't want to travel anymore.
I want to reschedule my trip for next year without any fees.
